chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-373 of 2020. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 31.05.2023 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for petitioner. Mr.Abdul Hamid Bhugri, Addl.A.G. =*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*= At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that stereotype reports are being furnished by the respondents for recovery of Insaf Ali who is missing since long, however; however, he would be satisfied, if this petition is kept on dormant file with direction to police to submit quarterly progress report in office, which is not opposed by learned Addl.A.G Sindh. It is ordered accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
